title: Recommendation: expand pilots after adoption lift
summary: Adoption is moving in the right direction, so the team can widen pilots while continuing to monitor setup issues.

claims.text: The docs refresh improved quickstart completion enough to justify broader pilots.
Support issues are mostly implementation details that can be handled reactively.
Reviewers want more traceability in generated recommendations.

openQuestions: Which teams should join the next pilot?
How much setup friction is acceptable during expansion?
recommendation: Expand the pilot and keep support ready to handle setup questions.
